accounts.notes:
purpose: Demand-deposit, business-account, base-account, and linked-account status.
key: account_id
required_fields: account_id, customer_id, product_name, status, balance_krw, is_limit_account, linked_service_ids, restriction_flags
verifier_use: account closure preconditions; limit-account transfer limits; base-account and linked-product restrictions

auto_transfer_rules.notes:
purpose: Scheduled deposit, recurring savings, auto collect, and auto transfer setup.
key: auto_transfer_id
required_fields: auto_transfer_id, source_account_id, target_id, status, schedule, amount_krw, success_count, failed_count
verifier_use: preferential-rate eligibility; failed auto debit cases; deadline and cancellation rules

businesses.notes:
purpose: Business-registration state for personal business products.
key: business_id
required_fields: business_id, customer_id, registration_status, is_primary_representative, business_type, business_purpose
verifier_use: personal-business-account eligibility; business credit/refinance eligibility; business credit-info service eligibility

card_orders.notes:
purpose: New issue and reissue requests.
key: card_order_id
required_fields: card_order_id, card_id, customer_id, request_type, status, reason
verifier_use: new-issue blocked but reissue allowed; lost/damaged reissue path

cards.notes:
purpose: mini card and debit/card-like payment instrument state.
key: card_id
required_fields: card_id, customer_id, linked_account_or_wallet_id, product_name, status, issued_at, expires_at, daily_limit_krw, monthly_limit_krw
verifier_use: minor card issuance/reissue; payment approval restrictions; lost-card compensation window

child_relationships.notes:
purpose: Child account/savings representative authority.
key: relationship_id
required_fields: relationship_id, child_customer_id, representative_customer_id, representative_role, status, child_age
verifier_use: primary versus assistant representative permissions; child reaches age 19 service transition; child account transfer authority

comparison_sessions.notes:
purpose: Loan comparison service quotes and selected partner-product handoff.
key: comparison_id
required_fields: comparison_id, customer_id, service_type, status, partner_id, quoted_rate, quoted_limit_krw, final_contract_id
verifier_use: quote is non-final; KakaoBank has no contract authority for partner products; partner limited market coverage

consents.notes:
purpose: Terms, guardian, privacy, and delegated-representative consent records.
key: consent_id
required_fields: consent_id, customer_id, consent_type, status, effective_at, expires_at
verifier_use: minor consent validity; credit-info affiliate-terms consent; child-service representative authority

customers.notes:
purpose: Customer identity, age, residency, customer class, and risk flags.
key: customer_id
required_fields: customer_id, name, date_of_birth, age, residency, employment_type, risk_flags
verifier_use: eligibility by age; minor and guardian consent checks; business-owner and employee loan/customer eligibility

deposit_contracts.notes:
purpose: Installment savings, fixed deposit, child savings, and one-month savings contracts.
key: deposit_id
required_fields: deposit_id, account_id, product_name, status, opened_at, matures_at, principal_krw, close_type, legal_restriction_flags
verifier_use: maturity-close versus early-close; partial/emergency withdrawal eligibility; auto-extension and auto-close exceptions

disputes.notes:
purpose: Card, transaction, service, and customer-objection dispute records.
key: dispute_id
required_fields: dispute_id, customer_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status, filed_at, resolution
verifier_use: lost-card fault exceptions; abnormal-transaction objection; affiliate-service responsibility disputes

group_memberships.notes:
purpose: Meeting-account owner/member state and information-sharing consent.
key: membership_id
required_fields: membership_id, service_id, account_id, customer_id, role, status, last_financial_info_consent_at
verifier_use: meeting-owner closure with remaining members; member visibility after consent expiry; owner versus member authority

lease_contracts.notes:
purpose: Lease deposit loan contract and landlord-payment state.
key: lease_id
required_fields: lease_id, loan_id, landlord_account_status, move_in_due_date, resident_registration_status, deposit_return_claim_status
verifier_use: landlord account block prevents execution; move-in and registration deadlines; lease cancellation and return-claim assignment

loan_applications.notes:
purpose: Pre-contract applications, comparison results, screening decisions, and customer-selected terms.
key: application_id
required_fields: application_id, customer_id, product_name, status, requested_amount_krw, approved_amount_krw, screening_result, selected_terms
verifier_use: comparison is not final contract; screening failure/refusal; selected preferential-rate conditions only

loans.notes:
purpose: Credit, business, lease, mortgage, and used-car loan contracts.
key: loan_id
required_fields: loan_id, customer_id, product_name, status, principal_krw, outstanding_krw, repayment_mode, maturity_date, late_days, restriction_flags
verifier_use: extension approval or rejection; acceleration and immediate repayment; withdrawal/cooling-off consequences; purpose-use violations

mortgage_collateral.notes:
purpose: Mortgage home, lien, move-in, and ownership-obligation state.
key: collateral_id
required_fields: collateral_id, loan_id, property_type, registration_status, move_in_due_date, move_in_verified, ownership_status
verifier_use: move-in pledge violation; lien cancellation sequence; collateral enforcement risk

pockets.notes:
purpose: Meeting-account pockets and record-book sections.
key: pocket_id
required_fields: pocket_id, parent_id, pocket_type, status, balance_krw, created_at
verifier_use: basic-pocket insufficient balance fallback; section close balance movement; latest-section-first legal processing

prepaid_wallets.notes:
purpose: KakaoBank mini prepaid balance and youth limits.
key: wallet_id
required_fields: wallet_id, customer_id, status, balance_krw, daily_spend_used_krw, monthly_spend_used_krw, age_band
verifier_use: mini is not a deposit account; age-band limits; guardian consent and refund restrictions

refinance_requests.notes:
purpose: Loan switching/refinance lifecycle for credit, business, and mortgage loans.
key: refinance_id
required_fields: refinance_id, customer_id, new_loan_id, old_loan_id, status, requested_at, old_loan_repayment_status, cancellation_reason
verifier_use: same-day duplicate request exceptions; old-loan repayment failure cancels new loan; normal old-loan repayment cannot be undone

remittance_cases.notes:
purpose: Outbound, inbound, return, correction, cancellation, and gift remittance cases.
key: remittance_id
required_fields: remittance_id, customer_id, direction, status, amount, currency, country, requested_at, correction_due_date
verifier_use: 2-business-day correction auto-cancel; fee refund or non-refund; 4th-business-day inbound batch deposit; 30-day gift auto-cancel

remittance_profiles.notes:
purpose: Outbound/inbound remittance eligibility, annual limits, and auto-receive settings.
key: remittance_profile_id
required_fields: remittance_profile_id, customer_id, base_account_id, annual_usd_sent, auto_receive_enabled, verified_purpose_codes
verifier_use: outbound age and account eligibility; annual no-document remittance limits; auto-receive exception cases

required_documents.notes:
purpose: Documents required before/after execution for loans, deposit restrictions, or identity verification.
key: document_id
required_fields: document_id, customer_id, target_type, target_id, document_type, status, due_date, submitted_at
verifier_use: pre-execution document blocking; post-execution deadline violations; document update or contract-modification restrictions

savings_boxes.notes:
purpose: SafeBox, Piggy Bank, VAT Box, Dollar Box, and record-book section-like balances.
key: box_id
required_fields: box_id, customer_id, product_name, base_account_id, status, balance, currency, limit_amount
verifier_use: linked-account-only deposits; box close or partial withdrawal restrictions; limit increase irreversible cases; currency-specific withdrawal and gift state

service_enrollments.notes:
purpose: Credit-info, business-credit-info, document box, child service, meeting account, VAT box, and linked services.
key: service_id
required_fields: service_id, customer_id, service_name, status, linked_account_id, started_at, ended_at, restriction_flags
verifier_use: service suspension/termination notice; linked-service closure preconditions; affiliate responsibility boundaries

transfer_references.notes:
purpose: Balance-less external payees and synthetic transfer sources or targets used by transfer tools.
key: reference_id
required_fields: reference_id, reference_type, currency, status
verifier_use: external payee target visibility; coupon or cashback source visibility; transfer source and target precondition checks without treating references as ledger rows

transactions.notes:
purpose: Posted or pending account, card, mini, savings-box, remittance, fee, and auto-collect transaction events.
key: transaction_id
required_fields: transaction_id, status, type_or_transaction_type
verifier_use: balance changes; collect/include/exclude transaction rules; fee assessment; lost-card compensation windows

vehicle_purchase_cases.notes:
purpose: Used-car purchase loan vehicle and title-transfer state.
key: vehicle_case_id
required_fields: vehicle_case_id, loan_id, dealer_id, payment_status, title_transfer_due_date, title_transfer_status, sale_contract_status
verifier_use: loan purpose restriction; 15-day title-transfer rule; sale cancellation triggers immediate repayment
